Off Calendar Nov-17-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Alexander Joshua Mueller, Respondent/Plaintiff
Gregory D. Rahn, Appellant/Defendant

This matter came on regularly for a small claims appeal. The parties were sworn and testified on their own behalf.

After having heard both sides presented oral and documentary evidence to the court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Charlene P. Rosack, Judge Pro Tem; Clerk: Leelay Chin; not reported (D. 525)
